finding_results.notes: Replaced repeated 'gave a ... laugh/half-smile' template with three distinct behavior beats (dismissive snort, hard tooth-baring, anxious exhale) tied to character-specific emotion.
finding_results.summary: Recurring reaction formula removed and diversified across all cited instances.

finding_results.notes: Inserted distributed Lena interiority in the briefing stretch: physical sensation (collar abrasion), memory/association (prior press-conference recall), and tactical self-assessment (weighing leverage and command intent), preventing long transcript-like runs.
finding_results.summary: Briefing sequence now sustains close POV with multiple distinct interior beats across the full span.

finding_results.notes: Replaced abstract governance language with concrete operational stakes and actions (intersection staffing, courthouse chamber protection, cemetery-road coverage, latent-lift imaging, intake-fridge sealing, records-room tamper vector).
finding_results.summary: Abstraction-heavy rhetoric was recast into scene-specific operational detail with less lexical checklist feel.

summary: All three prose/copyedit findings were resolved in-place while preserving chapter continuity, voice signatures, and heading contract.
